$comment: Alternate Sionna compute engines (see docs/engines.md and docs/sionna_versions.md; worker scripts ship in backend/seam_studio/engine_workers/, with backend/engine_workers/ or ~/.seam/engine_workers/ as optional override locations). Relative python paths resolve against the repo root. The builtin engine (backend/.venv, in-process sionna-rt) is implicit and always listed first by GET /api/engines.
